---
title: "fase_2_ditetiske_afvigelser"
subtitle: "`fase_2_ditetiske_afvigelser`"
description: "fase_2_ditetiske_afvigelser"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/fase_2_ditetiske_afvigelser/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                    | Title                                 | Type   | Description                                                                                                                   |
|-----------------------------------------|---------------------------------------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                 | The unique name of the event          | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                            |
| `center`                                | Research center                       | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                         |
| `date_registration_dietary_deviation_2` | date_registration_dietary_deviation_2 | date   | Date for when the deviation is registered during phase 1. Dietary deviations phase 2. Repeated instrument.                    |
| `staff_initials_dietary_deviation_2`    | staff_initials_dietary_deviation_2    | string | Initials of the study staff member responsible for registration of the dietary deviation during phase 2. Repeated instrument. |
| `date_dietary_deviation_2`              | date_dietary_deviation_2              | date   | Start date for possible planed deviation from dietary recommendations. Phase 2. Repeated instrument.                          |
| `date_end_dietary_deviation_2`          | date_end_dietary_deviation_2          | date   | End date for possible planed deviation from dietary recommendations. Phase 2. Repeated instrument.                            |
| `reason_dietary_deviation_2`            | reason_dietary_deviation_2            | string | Description of the deviation. Phase 2. Repeated instrument.                                                                   |
| `food_dietary_deviation_2`              | food_dietary_deviation_2              | string | What types of foods. Phase 2. Repeated instrument.                                                                            |
| `substitution_dietary_deviation_2`      | substitution_dietary_deviation_2      | string | Substitution for different foods. Phase 2. Repeated instrument.                                                               |
| `reasonother_dietary_deviation_2`       | reasonother_dietary_deviation_2       | string | If "other" was chosen elaborate it. Phase 2. Repeated instrument.                                                             |
| `plan_dietary_deviation_2`              | plan_dietary_deviation_2              | string | Document with plan for planned deviation during phase 2. Repeated instrument.                                                 |
| `comment_dietary_deviation_2`           | comment_dietary_deviation_2           | string | Comment to dietary deviations. Repeated instrument.                                                                           |

: Fields in the `fase_2_ditetiske_afvigelser` resource.
